title: Review: full-project pre-merge review
notes: Maintainer risk: Bitwarden private API (.internal field) is the highest ongoing risk — compile breaks silently on SDK upgrade. String-match error classifier is a silent logic risk. Both need tracking as SDK evolves. All other backends use stable public APIs. 429 mapping bugs in Doppler and Vault are straightforward fixes.
design: Confidence: HIGH on P0 bugs (code path is unambiguous, GCP comparison is exact). HIGH on P1 bitwarden risks (private field access is visible in source). MEDIUM on decision records (design intent inferred from code + comments, not spec doc). No findings in: env, file, cache, aws-sm, aws-ssm, aws-kms, azure-kv, gcp-sm, keyring, local-signing, pkcs11, wolfhsm core logic.
